interpretation: Current KOSDAQ zero-result behavior is no longer a hidden system failure. The remaining blocks are mostly explainable risk controls.
Lowering KOSDAQ liquidity thresholds slightly would not rescue the sampled failures because the blocked names are far below the turnover floor, not marginal misses.
The KOSDAQ BEAR hard-filter relax to alpha>=45 is supported by external labeled outcomes and is now wired in safely.
The remaining precision-gate block in RED market still looks justified for weak T3 / low-clean-prob setups.
next_actions: Add KOSDAQ tradable-universe prefilter based on recent turnover before deep scan evaluation.
Prioritize liquid KOSDAQ names inside the scanner input universe instead of spending scan budget on sub-scale names.
Accumulate realized outcomes and re-estimate KOSDAQ RED precision thresholds with live labels.
